question: Which structural intervention maximizes retrieval recovery at scale?

s403_comparison.note: 62 new lessons but only 2 new index pointers — coverage declining

a_index_expansion.description: Expand INDEX.md L-ID pointers from ~5 to 8-10 per theme bucket

b_citation_graph_tool.description: Build citation-graph retrieval tool: given L-ID or keyword, BFS 2-3 hops
b_citation_graph_tool.maintenance_cost: ZERO — edges added automatically via Cites: headers
b_citation_graph_tool.limitation: Requires knowing one seed lesson. 10.3% isolated lessons unreachable.

c_domain_crossref.description: Cross-reference domain indexes into global retrieval layer
c_domain_crossref.note: Already counted in combined 29.5% — no coverage lift, only UX

recommendation.secondary: a_index_expansion (modest — for cold-start coverage of isolated 10.3%)
recommendation.rationale: Citation graph covers 86.6% via giant component with zero maintenance cost. INDEX expansion adds only 12pp for high manual cost. Hybrid: graph as primary, INDEX as cold-start fallback.
recommendation.key_insight: Retrieval has two modes: cold-start (INDEX/keyword search, no prior context) and exploration (have one lesson, find related). Citation graph solves exploration. INDEX solves cold start. Both needed but graph has 5x more coverage per unit effort.

hub_structure.l601_concentration: L-601 has 4.2x inbound of L-613 — single point of failure risk
hub_structure.hub_dependence: Removing L-601 would fragment 89.9% of cascade contamination edges (L-923)

expect: Pointer coverage still ~31% at N=841. Citation-graph would reach 60%+ via transitive edges. Best: citation-graph prosthetic.
actual: Pointer coverage DECLINED to 29.5% (-2.1pp from S403). Citation-graph reaches 86.6% via giant component (65.2% at 2 hops, 78.5% at 3 hops). 10.3% isolated lessons need fallback. Recommendation: hybrid (citation-graph primary + INDEX cold-start).
diff: Pointer coverage slightly worse than expected (29.5% vs ~31%). Citation-graph coverage far exceeds expectation (86.6% vs 60%+). The giant component is larger than predicted — most lessons are connected within 3 hops. Isolated lesson fraction (10.3%) was unexpected — these need separate treatment.
